# LLM Output Rewrite

> [!TIP]
> Paste the original LLM output with `Ctrl+Shift+V` to auto-convert HTML to clean Markdown. Insert today's date with `Ctrl+;`. Then rewrite from scratch below.

---

## Original

> [Paste the LLM output here. Keep it verbatim — typos, formatting, and all.]

**Word count:** [Approximate length]

## My Version

[Write your version here. The goal is not to "improve" the AI output but to express the same ideas in words that feel like yours. If you cannot explain it simply, you do not understand it well enough.]

## What I Changed

| Original | My Version | Why |
|----------|------------|-----|
| [AI phrasing or claim] | [How you restated it] | [Was it wrong? Too vague? Too jargon-heavy?] |
| [Another passage] | [Your version] | [Reason for the change] |
| [Another passage] | [Your version] | [Reason] |

> [!TIP]
> The "Why" column is the most valuable part. It forces you to articulate the gap between the AI's understanding and yours.

## Reflection

**What surprised me:** [Anything unexpected you noticed while rewriting?]

**What I still need to learn:** [Gaps the rewrite exposed]

**Would I trust the original as-is?** Yes / Partially / No — [Brief reason]

---

*Captured with Mark It Down*
